blockers: All 17 remaining pending_judge rows fail first-pass visual parity.
Most rows remain generic diamond/daymark substitutes instead of the exact reference symbol family.
WRECKS01/WRECKS04/WRECKS05, ZZZZZZ01, and boyspp50 are non-diamond but still mismatch their exact symbol class/variant or lack usable local reference render detail.
No row has Steve final approval or exact-crop final-pass clearance; chart1_parity_gate keeps every row non-final.
